title: Lijm's Expanse
description: Lijm’s Expanse expands Minecraft with firearm manufacturing, vehicle assembly, magic, spell tomes, new bosses, and even cheesemaking. A vast new expanse of possibilities awaits!
body:
Enter a new era of innovation with Lijm’s Expanse! Using the Lathe, master the art of advanced weapon manufacturing and forge new and powerful firearms like pistols, flintlocks, revolvers, rifles, machine guns, and a ballistic blade are introduced in this mod. Each weapon can be customized with new enchantments tailored to fit your unique playstyle. Uncover the secrets of magic through mana and spell tomes. Challenge 2 new formidable bosses, or try your hand at cheesemaking. Whether through steel, sorcery, or craftsmanship, a vast new expanse of possibilities awaits.

Lijm’s Expanse adds an assortment of new weaponry:

- Pistols
- Revolvers
- Flintlock
- Shotguns
- Rifles
- Water-Cooled Machine Gun
- Ballistic Blade
- Throwing Stars

Enhance your arsenal further with new gun enchantments:

- Creeper Rounds I-II
- Blaze's Breath
- Lucky Bullets I-IV
- Bloom Boom I-III
- Storm Caller
- Chamber Glide I-III
- Curse of Jamming
- Curse of Raging Recoil

Bring mobility to your world with functional vehicles:

- Tractor
- Van
- Roadster
- Offroader

New bosses also await battle:

- The Nether Gunner Guardian - This formidable enemy drops rare gun components and is summoned in the Nether by activating a Blackstone Gun with redstone after priming it using a Bell Round.
- The Wizard Guardian - This mysthical foe can be summoned by placing 2 Amethysts Shards in a Resonator.

Master the ways of Cheesemaking:

- Soft Cheese
- Cheese Wheel
- Pastizzi

Cast spells during battle using the Spell Tome - These can be added by enchanting the Spell Tome which uses paper as ammunition:

- Mana Flow I-III
- Cluster Cast I-IV
- Bombonomicon I-III
- Arcane Combustion
- Brewing Tempest I-III
- Spectral Cloak I-IV
- Guarding Lexicon I-IV
- Curse of Papercuts
- Curse of Infernal Banishment

Lijm’s Expanse has much more to come - Future updates will continue to expand the base game with new content, mechanics, and features.

Feel free to add this mod to any modpack you like. Enjoy the mod :)
